member.name: T:BadMnemonicException
member.summary: Custom exception for when there are issues with the mnemonic.

member.name: M:BadMnemonicException.#ctor(Mnemonic,BadMnemonicReason,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})
member.summary: The reason for which the mnemonic failed validation.

member.name: M:BadMnemonicException.#ctor(Mnemonic,BadMnemonicReason,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Int32})_2
member.summary:
If not null, these are the indices in the mnemonic that were not found in the BIP-39 standard English word list.

If {@code reason == BadMnemonicReason.UnknownWords} then this will be not null.
